hyperedges.label: Deploy Pipeline (skill + npm command + GitHub Actions + GitHub Pages)
Nuxt CI/CD GitHub Pages Pipeline
Animation Component System (gradient bg, magnetic button, scroll reveal)
Persistent Page Shell (app root, header, footer)
Scroll-Driven Entrance Animation Pattern (all page sections using ScrollReveal)
GSAP scroll animation system
hyperedges.note: useGsap exposes gsap and ScrollTrigger; useParallax and useScrollReveal both consume them for scroll-driven animations with shared prefers-reduced-motion guard

hyperedges.label: Supabase blog data access layer
hyperedges.note: useSupabase provides the singleton client; useArticle and useArticles both call it to fetch blog content from Supabase

hyperedges.label: i18n bilingual translation system
hyperedges.note: i18n.config sets French as default/fallback locale; en.json and fr.json provide parallel translation keys for all UI text

hyperedges.label: PDF.js custom element integration: dynamic import in client plugin, excluded from Vite optimization, rendered in CV page
i18n routing and key management: prefix strategy in nuxt config drives route definitions in routes.json, managed by add-translation skill
Supabase blog data layer: useArticle and useArticles composables tested with mocked SupabaseClient in parallel spec files
